title: Beautiful Heidi up for adoption at the SPCA
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA has many...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA has many adorable dogs, cats, puppies and kittens eagerly waiting for their forever homes. Heidi is a beautiful medium-sized crossbreed of about three years old.


> Gentle by nature, she adores people and gets along wonderfully with other dogs.


She came to us as an unclaimed treatment case, and now she’s ready to be welcomed into the loving family she deserves.

Come and meet these furry friends in Ossie Urban Road, Tamsui Industria, and find your perfect match.

For more information or to adopt, phone 044 878 1990.

Heidi is a beautiful medium-sized crossbreed of about three years old.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
